nodes.name: Schedule - Check Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours during business days to check for outstanding invoices. Adjust the frequency based on your volume -- once daily is fine for most small businesses; every 6 hours for higher-volume operations.

nodes.name: Fetch Unpaid Invoices
nodes.notes: Pulls all unpaid and overdue invoices from your invoicing platform. This example uses a generic REST API call -- replace the URL and auth with your specific tool (QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Stripe Invoicing, Wave). Most invoicing APIs support filtering by status.

nodes.name: Categorize by Overdue Status
nodes.notes: Calculates days past due for each invoice and assigns a reminder tier: upcoming (3 days before due), due_today, gentle (1-7 days), firm (8-21 days), final (22-45 days), or escalate (45+ days). Skips invoices that already received a reminder at the current tier to prevent duplicate emails.

nodes.name: Any Action Needed?
nodes.notes: If no invoices require follow-up, the workflow ends quietly. No notifications, no logs -- just a clean exit.

nodes.name: Route by Reminder Tier
nodes.notes: Routes each invoice to the appropriate email template based on its reminder tier. Each tier has a different subject line, tone, and call to action.

parameters.subject: Friendly reminder: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} is due in a few days
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.clientName}},

Just a quick heads-up that invoice #{{$json.invoiceNumber}} for {{$json.amountFormatted}} is coming due on {{$json.dueDate}}.

No action needed if payment is already on its way. If you'd like to take care of it now, you can view and pay the invoice here:

View Invoice

If you have any questions about this invoice, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out.

Thanks,
Billing Team

nodes.name: Email - Courtesy Reminder
nodes.notes: Sent 3 days before the due date. Tone: friendly, no pressure. Just making sure it's on their radar.

parameters.subject: Payment reminder: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} is due today
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.clientName}},

This is a reminder that invoice #{{$json.invoiceNumber}} for {{$json.amountFormatted}} is due today ({{$json.dueDate}}).

If you've already sent payment, thank you -- please disregard this message. Otherwise, you can view and pay the invoice here:

Pay Invoice Now

Let us know if there are any issues with the invoice or if you need to arrange a different payment timeline.

Best,
Billing Team

nodes.name: Email - Due Today
nodes.notes: Sent on the due date. Tone: direct but polite. Clear call to action.

parameters.subject: Follow-up: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} is {{$json.daysPastDue}} days past due
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.clientName}},

I wanted to follow up on invoice #{{$json.invoiceNumber}} for {{$json.amountFormatted}}, which was due on {{$json.dueDate}}. It's currently {{$json.daysPastDue}} days past due.

We understand things get busy. If there's an issue with the invoice or if you'd like to discuss payment arrangements, we're happy to work with you -- just reply to this email.

View & Pay Invoice

Thank you for your attention to this.

Best,
Billing Team

nodes.name: Email - Gentle Reminder
nodes.notes: Sent 1-7 days after the due date. Tone: understanding but clear. Acknowledges they might be busy, offers to discuss.

parameters.subject: Action required: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} is now {{$json.daysPastDue}} days overdue
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.clientName}},

We're reaching out again regarding invoice #{{$json.invoiceNumber}} for {{$json.amountFormatted}}. This invoice was due on {{$json.dueDate}} and is now {{$json.daysPastDue}} days overdue.

We haven't received payment or heard back from you about this balance. We'd like to resolve this as quickly as possible.

Please take one of the following actions:

  1. Pay the invoice using the link below
  2. Reply to this email to discuss payment arrangements
  3. Let us know if there's a dispute with the charges

Pay Invoice Now

We value our relationship with {{$json.clientName}} and want to keep things running smoothly.

Regards,
Billing Team

nodes.name: Email - Firm Reminder
nodes.notes: Sent 8-21 days after the due date. Tone: professional urgency. Clear action items. Red CTA button to convey importance.

parameters.subject: Final notice: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} - {{$json.daysPastDue}} days overdue
parameters.html:
Dear {{$json.clientName}},

This is our final automated reminder regarding invoice #{{$json.invoiceNumber}} for {{$json.amountFormatted}}, originally due on {{$json.dueDate}}. This balance is now {{$json.daysPastDue}} days overdue.

If we do not receive payment or a response within 7 business days, we will need to escalate this matter internally. We strongly prefer to resolve this directly with you.

Pay Invoice Immediately

If you've already submitted payment, please forward confirmation to this email so we can update our records.

If you're experiencing financial difficulties and need to arrange a payment plan, please reply to this email. We're willing to work out a reasonable arrangement.

Regards,
Billing Department

nodes.name: Email - Final Notice
nodes.notes: Sent 22-45 days after the due date. Tone: formal, serious. Mentions escalation but still offers a path to resolution. This is the last automated email before human intervention.

nodes.name: Slack - Escalation Alert
nodes.notes: Escalation alert for invoices 45+ days overdue. At this point, automated emails have not resolved the issue and a human needs to step in. Consider also creating a task in your PM tool for tracking.

nodes.name: Update Invoice - Mark Reminder Sent
nodes.notes: Updates the invoice metadata to record which reminder tier was sent. This prevents duplicate reminders on the next workflow run. Adjust the API endpoint to match your invoicing platform's metadata/custom fields API.

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Activity
nodes.notes: Logs every reminder sent for audit trail and reporting. Columns: timestamp, invoiceId, invoiceNumber, clientName, clientEmail, amount, daysPastDue, reminderTier, reminderAction. Useful for understanding your collections performance over time.

meta.author: Relay Launch
meta.description: Automated invoice follow-up system that runs on a schedule, pulls unpaid invoices from your billing platform, categorizes them by how overdue they are, and sends graduated reminder emails -- from a friendly courtesy notice before the due date, through gentle and firm reminders, to a final notice and internal escalation for severely overdue accounts. Tracks all activity to prevent duplicate sends and logs everything for reporting.
requiredCredentials: Invoicing platform API key (QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Stripe, etc.)
